items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding 'Wishlist items linked to sellables', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, such as resource creation and booking processes, without addressing the wishlist items specifically.
